title: AURORA, 33533, Palm Pals Lady Spaniel Dog, 5In, Soft Toy, Brown & White,Medium
features: From Aurora's highly popular Palm Pals Collection
Soft and extremely touchable dog soft toy made with high quality materials
Adorable Lady Spaniel Dog cuddly toy that is filled with beans
Eco-friendly with filling and beans made from recycled plastics
description: Product Description This cute Lady Spaniel Dog fits into the palm of your hand, she is full of beans which makes her super soft and cuddly. Her body is a soft brown & white plush material. This is a super cute playful Spaniel Dog soft toy. Palm Pals make great gifts for any occasion, whether it is for a birthday or as a general gift, everyone will fall in love with this adorable Spaniel Dog. Mr Nick Scottie Dog is part of our Eco-Friendly initiative and comes with inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic materials. Our hangtags are recyclable with our cloth labels being made from recycled materials. Aurora World is an industry leader with over 40 years of experience in designing and manufacturing innovative and high quality plush products. Directions No specific directions required. Simply cuddle and play with the toy.

specifications_table.Radio Control Suitability: ‎Cuddling, play, gift, interaction with young children
